items.title: Assign named reviewers
items.reason: 3 reviewer roles require real project-owner assignment.
items.next_action: Project owner names data, corpus, and legal reviewers.

items.title: Complete packet review
items.next_action: Review, approve, revise, split, or quarantine each pending packet.

items.title: Run official-source refresh checks
items.reason: Network source refresh was intentionally not performed in local freshness reporting.
items.next_action: Run official source connectors with network access under controlled refresh windows.

items.title: Approve external reliance
items.reason: Geode has system controls, but legal reliance requires explicit legal reviewer approval.
items.next_action: Legal reviewer approves specific outputs before external reliance.

items.title: Resolve blocked download for EO-2019-007
items.reason: Official public download returns a Google Drive sign-in page instead of a usable executive order PDF.
items.next_action: Request a valid official copy from the Governor's Office or State Archives, archive it through manual source intake, then rerun the EO source-anchoring workflow.

items.title: Resolve blocked download for LEGISCAN-LIVE-REFRESH
items.reason: Live LegiScan bill refresh requires LEGISCAN_API_KEY, and that environment variable is not configured in this session.
items.next_action: Configure LEGISCAN_API_KEY, then run the LegiScan current-session or all-session refresh and rebuild the legislation layer.
